message:
feat(robot): add CASS topic filtering for relevance scoring (ntm-gr5b)

Implement topic-based filtering to improve CASS search relevance:

- Add Topic type with 8 categories: auth, ui, api, database, testing,
  infrastructure, docs, general
- Add topicKeywords map with indicator keywords for each topic
- Implement DetectTopics() to extract topics from prompts/content
- Add TopicFilterConfig with enabled, match_topics, exclude_topics,
  same_topic_boost (default 1.5x), different_topic_penalty (default 0.5x)
- Update FilterResults to apply topic-based score multipliers
- Exempt general topic from penalty to avoid penalizing generic content
- Add comprehensive tests for all topic filtering functionality

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
